entry.title: Real-time OpenAI Response Streaming
entry.content:
The Realtime API enables you to build low-latency, multi-modal conversational experiences. It currently supports text and audio as both input and output, as well as function calling.

Quickstart

The Realtime API is a WebSocket interface that is designed to run on the server. To help you get started quickly, we've created a console demo application that shows some of the features of the API.

Overview

The Realtime API is a stateful, event-based API that communicates over a WebSocket. The WebSocket connection requires the following parameters:

  • URL: wss://api.openai.com/v1/realtime
  • Query Parameters: ?model=gpt-4o-realtime-preview-2024-10-01
  • Headers:
    • Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
    • OpenAI-Beta: realtime=v1

      Below is a simple example using Python - FastAPi

      📦openAI-realtime
 ┣ 📂app
          ┗  📂routes
          ┗  📜 health_check.py
          ┗  📜 realtime.py
         ┗  📜 config.py
         ┗  📜 main.py
      ┣ 📂client 
         ┗  📜 client.html

Create a .env file in the root directory with the following content. Use the appropriate URL depending on whether you are using OpenAI or Azure OpenAI:

OPENAI_API_KEY="your-openai-api-key"
OPENAI_REALTIME_URL="wss://api.openai.com/v1/realtime?model=gpt-4o-realtime-preview-2024-10-01"
USE_AZURE_OPENAI=False
 

For Azure OpenAI, replace the URL as follows and set USE_AZURE_OPENAI to True:

OPENAI_API_KEY="your-azure-openai-api-key"
OPENAI_REALTIME_URL="wss://<sub-domain>.openai.azure.com/openai/realtime?api-version=2024-10-01-preview&deployment=gpt-4o-realtime-preview"
USE_AZURE_OPENAI=True
 
 

app/routes/realtime.py

 

 

import asyncio
import json
import logging
import websockets
import traceback

from fastapi import WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect, APIRouter
from app.config import VENDOR_WS_URL, API_KEY, USE_AZURE_OPENAI

realtime_router = APIRouter()

# Set up logging
logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.DEBUG, format="%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s"
)

# Determine appropriate headers
extra_headers = (
    {
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {API_KEY}",
        "openai-beta": "realtime=v1",
    }
    if USE_AZURE_OPENAI
    else {"api-key": API_KEY}
)


async def relay_messages(client_ws: WebSocket, vendor_ws):
    """Relay messages between client and vendor WebSockets."""

    async def client_to_vendor():
        try:
            while True:
                data = await client_ws.receive_json()
                if data and json_validator(data):
                    await vendor_ws.send(json.dumps(data))
                else:
                    warning_msg = "Invalid data: payload should be JSON."
                    logging.warning(warning_msg)
                    await send_text_safe(client_ws, warning_msg)
        except WebSocketDisconnect:
            logging.info("Client WebSocket disconnected.")
        except Exception as e:
            print(traceback.format_exc())

            logging.error(f"Error in client_to_vendor: {e}")

    async def vendor_to_client():
        try:
            while True:
                data = await vendor_ws.recv()
                await client_ws.send_text(data)
        except websockets.exceptions.ConnectionClosed as e:
            logging.info(f"Vendor WebSocket disconnected: {e}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(traceback.format_exc())

            logging.error(f"Error in vendor_to_client: {e}")

    tasks = [
        asyncio.create_task(client_to_vendor()),
        asyncio.create_task(vendor_to_client()),
    ]
    done, pending = await asyncio.wait(tasks, return_when=asyncio.FIRST_COMPLETED)
    for task in pending:
        task.cancel()
        await asyncio.gather(task, return_exceptions=True)


@realtime_router.websocket("/realtime")
async def websocket_endpoint(websocket: WebSocket):
    """Handle WebSocket connections from clients."""
    client_ip = websocket.client.host
    logging.info(f"Client connected: {client_ip}")
    await websocket.accept()

    try:
        async with websockets.connect(
            VENDOR_WS_URL, extra_headers=extra_headers
        ) as vendor_ws:
            logging.info("Connected to vendor WebSocket.")
            await relay_messages(websocket, vendor_ws)
    except websockets.exceptions.InvalidHandshake as e:
        error_msg = f"Vendor WebSocket handshake failed: {e}"
        logging.error(error_msg)
        await send_text_safe(websocket, error_msg)
    except WebSocketDisconnect:
        logging.info(f"Client disconnected: {client_ip}")
    except Exception as e:
        logging.error(f"Unexpected error: {e}")
        await send_text_safe(websocket, f"Unexpected error: {e}")


async def send_text_safe(ws: WebSocket, message: str):
    """Safely send messages to the client WebSocket."""
    try:
        await ws.send_text(message)
    except Exception as e:
        logging.error(f"Error sending message to client: {e}")


def json_validator(data) -> bool:
    """Validate if the input data is JSON."""
    try:
        print(f"data: {data}")
        # Check if data is already a dict, which is valid JSON in Python
        if isinstance(data, dict):
            return True
        # Check if the input is a non-empty string
        if isinstance(data, str) and data.strip() == "":
            return False
        # If data is a string, try to load it as JSON
        json.loads(data)
        return True
    except (json.JSONDecodeError, TypeError):
        return False

 

 

app/routes/health_check.py

 

 

from fastapi import APIRouter
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse

health_check_router = APIRouter()


@health_check_router.get("/")
async def health_check():
    return JSONResponse(content={"status": "Iam Alive!"}, status_code=200)

 

 

app/config.py

 

 

import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv

# Load environment variables from .env file
load_dotenv()

# Configuration variables
VENDOR_WS_URL = os.getenv("OPENAI_REALTIME_URL")
API_KEY = os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")
USE_AZURE_OPENAI = bool(os.getenv("USE_AZURE_OPENAI"))

 

 

app/main.py

 

 

from fastapi import FastAPI
from app.routes.health_check import health_check_router
from app.routes.realtime import realtime_router

app = FastAPI()

# Registering routers
app.include_router(health_check_router)
app.include_router(realtime_router)

 

 

client/client.html

 

 

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>WebSocket Client</title>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>WebSocket Client</h1>
    <button id="connectButton">Connect to WebSocket</button>
    <br><br>
    <textarea id="messageInput" placeholder="Enter your message here..." rows="4" cols="50"></textarea>
    <br>
    <button id="sendButton" disabled>Send Message</button>
    <h2>Messages:</h2>
    <pre id="messages"></pre>

    <script>
        let websocket;
        const connectButton = document.getElementById('connectButton');
        const sendButton = document.getElementById('sendButton');
        const messageInput = document.getElementById('messageInput');
        const messagesDisplay = document.getElementById('messages');

        connectButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
            websocket = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:8000/realtime');

            websocket.onopen = () => {
                messagesDisplay.textContent += 'Connected to WebSocket server.\n';
                sendButton.disabled = false;
            };

            websocket.onmessage = (event) => {
                messagesDisplay.textContent += 'Received: ' + event.data + '\n';
            };

            websocket.onclose = () => {
                messagesDisplay.textContent += 'WebSocket connection closed.\n';
                sendButton.disabled = true;
            };

            websocket.onerror = (error) => {
                messagesDisplay.textContent += 'WebSocket error: ' + error.message + '\n';
            };
        });

        sendButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const message = messageInput.value.trim();
            if (message !== '') {
                websocket.send(message);
                messagesDisplay.textContent += 'Sent: ' + message + '\n';
                messageInput.value = '';
            } else {
                alert('Please enter a message to send.');
            }
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>

 

 

requirements.txt

fastapi==0.115.0
uvicorn==0.31.0
websockets==13.1
python-dotenv==1.0.1

Install dependencies:

 

 

pip install -r requirements.txt<div class=""><h2>Usage<a class="" href="https://github.com/Geo-Joy/openai-realtime-fastapi/blob/main/README.md#usage" target="_blank"><p>To start the application, use Uvicorn to run the FastAPI server:<li-code lang="abap">uvicorn main:app --reload

 

 

 

The application should now be running on http://localhost:8000.

 

Reference Links

  • Realtime API Documentation
  • Azure Realtime Audio SDK Samples

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano, 

I am deeply interested in the field of data, and recently, I was introduced to SAP. As someone from an engineering background with a strong passion for data-driven decision-making, I have been exploring opportunities to transition into the SAP industry, particularly in modules involving planning.

The comprehensive tools and frameworks offered by SAP have caught my attention, and I am eager to deepen my knowledge through your SAP courses. I see SAP certifications as a pivotal step in upskilling myself and aligning my career with the cutting-edge solutions SAP provides in data and planning.

The SAP Digital Skills Initiative Program offers an excellent pathway for individuals like me to obtain official certifications, and I am more motivated than ever to pursue this certification to validate my skills. I hope to further expand my expertise and contribute meaningfully to this dynamic industry.

entry.title: Career Progression Advice
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am certified in S4 HANA FI 1709 and certified in S4 HANA CFIN. I have close to 5 yrs of experience in CFIN - Run and Maintenance , Treasury experience in IHC, BAM of 1.5 years , with overall 9 years of experience. Please guide me as to how to advance my career further as at this point of time I feel stuck. Any guidance would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Unique Constraint Violated Error [301]
entry.content:
Hello junwu,

Query runs in a transaction and I'm logging every time when transaction starts. I checked the logs and transaction runs only once. And transaction only have one query there is no other query can duplicate the record.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David!

I hope this message finds you well. I am excited to apply for the SAP Digital Skills initiative and share my journey with you. As a woman and minority in a region with limited opportunities, I am seeking to transition my career mid-life. I hold a Bachelor of Arts degree and have experience as a Learning and Development Specialist at a business consulting firm, where I design and implement training programs tailored for Supply Chain Management.

I am eager to participate in this initiative because SAP certification is a globally recognized credential. Becoming an SAP consultant would significantly enhance my career prospects and expertise, opening doors to more lucrative opportunities.

Thank you in advance for considering my application.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: Development with wonderful sight 🙂

entry.title: how to repeat table header in all pages
entry.content:
Hi All,
I've made Adobe form for delivery & included header and items table in it.

My problem is when the line items are getting oveflowed they are going on next page which is correct, but along with that line items "table header" is not going to next page. 
i want that 'table header' on next page till the items goes to the page.

NOTE: i tried option "include header in sunsequent pages" for header row, but it is showing till the 2nd page only.
please suggest something.
thanks.

entry.title: Configure an SAP CAP Application to Connect to an SAP HANA Cloud Database in Another Global Account
entry.content:
How to Configure an SAP CAP Application to Connect to an SAP HANA Cloud Database in Another Global Account or Subaccount Without HDI

When your SAP HANA Cloud database is in another Global Account or subaccount, which prevents the natural use of the HDI container for database object management, you need to follow the steps below to configure your SAP CAP application and achieve a successful connection.

Step 1: Configure a User-Provided Service

It is essential to create a user-provided service using the Cloud Foundry command line. This is important because SAP CAP requires the service to have three specific tags to automatically determine which configuration to use.

Run the following command:

cf create-user-provided-service ups-database-external -t "hana,database,relational"
  • ups-database-external: This is the name you assign to your service.
  • -t "hana,database,relational": These are the tags that CAP uses to identify the database service.

Step 2: Modify the Service's JSON in SAP BTP

After creating the service via the command line, you need to specify the connection data in the service's JSON in SAP BTP.

The JSON should contain the following:

{
  "encrypt": true,
  "host": "your-hana-cloud-host",
  "password": "your-password",
  "port": "443",
  "schema": "YOUR_SCHEMA_NAME",
  "sslValidateCertificate": true,
  "user": "your-username"
}
  • host: The address of your SAP HANA Cloud instance.
  • user and password: The credentials of the user with permissions to access the database schema.
  • schema: The schema where your database objects are located or will be created.
  • encrypt and sslValidateCertificate: Settings to ensure the connection is secure via SSL/TLS.
  • port: The connection port, generally "443" for secure connections.

Step 3: Modify package.json or .cdsrc.json

You need to tell SAP CAP which service to use to obtain the credentials. This is done by modifying your project's package.json or .cdsrc.json file.

Add or update the "requires" section as follows:

{
  "requires": {
    "db": {
      "kind": "hana",
      "credentials": {
        "service": "ups-database-external"
      }
    },
    "[production]": {
      "auth": "xsuaa",
      "db": {
        "kind": "hana",
        "credentials": {
          "service": "ups-database-external"
        }
      },
      "data": false
    }
  }
}
  • "service": "ups-database-external": Indicates to CAP that it should use the provided service named ups-database-external.
  • "[production]": Ensures that the same configuration is used in the production profile.

Step 4: Remove HDI-Related Configurations

Since you are not using HDI for database object management, you need to remove all references and configurations related to HDI in your mta.yaml file or your project's deployment configurations.

This includes:

  • Removing modules or resources that create or manage HDI containers.
  • Deleting dependencies between modules and HDI resources.

Step 5: Bind the Service to the CAP Application Instance in SAP BTP

For your CAP application to take the specified credentials and configuration, you need to bind the provided service to your application's instance in SAP BTP.

You can do this in two ways:

Option 1: Manual Binding

After deploying the application, run the command:

cf bind-service your-application-name ubs-database-external

Then, restart your application:

cf restart your-application-name

Option 2: Automatic Binding in mta.yaml

Add the binding in your mta.yaml file so that it is performed automatically during deployment.

Example of how to define the binding in mta.yaml:

modules:
  - name: your-application-name
    type: nodejs
    path: .
    requires:
      - name: ups-database-external
resources:
  - name: ups-database-external
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: user-provided
      service-name: ups-database-external

Step 6: Manually Deploy the Database Objects

Since you are not using HDI, you need to manually deploy the database objects in your SAP HANA Cloud instance.

1. Generate the SQL Scripts

From your CDS models, generate the SQL scripts using the following commands:

cds compile db/ --to sql --src db cds compile srv/ --to sql --src srv

These commands generate SQL scripts from your model definitions in the db/ and srv/ directories.

2. Execute the Scripts in the Database Console

  • Access SAP HANA Database Explorer.
  • Connect to your SAP HANA Cloud instance.
  • Execute the generated SQL scripts to create the necessary tables and views in your schema.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: Simple setup for work and for leisure.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA_Letter of credit processing
entry.content:
Hello Experts.

Could you please advise on the steps to be followed for Letter of credit processing through TRM module Trade Finance Integration with SD module. 

Our requirement is to link the Letter of Credit document in sales order and have the control in Delivery and Billing based on Letter of credit (L/c) value and validity.

Please advise 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: F-36 bill of exchange reference field updating with Transaction record number
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

User is entering Reference(DRxxxxx1234) and assignent Fields manually in T code F-36 Bill Of Exchange. However, till simulate reference field is showing same text as user entered but once posting happenned, reference field and assignments are updating with Transaction record number(1xxxxxxxxx03) (The text user enters in reference and assignments fields are over riding).

User wants the same text as he entered in Reference and assignment fields. Please help where can we configurer it.

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP DSP Task Chains with CLI Wrapping: FastAPI Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Christian! awesome step-by-step guidance; on a silver plate :). Thanks. Martin

Manual login / hurdle to full automation. You mean that every 30 days you have to update the secrets-file.json, rt please? The token will be invalidated, but else the OAuth works fine, or did you find issues there please?

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

I am interested in the field of data, and recently, I was introduced to SAP. As someone from an engineering background with a strong passion for data-driven decision-making, I have been exploring opportunities to transition into the SAP industry, particularly in modules involving planning.

entry.title: I am unable to log in with SAP* or DDIC user passwords
entry.content:
I have created a new client (787) and performed a local client copy from client 000 using the profile SAP_ALL. After the copy was completed, I am unable to log in with SAP* or DDIC user passwords. Could anyone please guide me through resolving this issue?

I am new to SAP BASIS, and we are running on Windows ECC 6.0 with Sybase DB.

Any help would be appreciated!

Faiyaz

entry.title: Error/Mistake on website
entry.content:
Hi Everyone and SAP Team, 

                            I want to mention that by mistake on work streams in learning journey for Discovering SAP Activate - Tools and Methodology the following paragraph is repeated two time. Kindly forward to website admin or concerned to correct. 

Link : https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-sap-activate-implementation-tools-and-methodology/discovering-the-workstreams

Paragraphs below 

Regards, 

Muhammad Rizwan 

Project Manager

entry.title: SAP fiori connecting to fastapi
entry.content:
I have developed a SAP Fiori application in SAP Business Application Studio and initialized the FastAPI web framework within my project. However, while attempting to run the SAP Fiori UI app, I am encountering issues retrieving results.
AJAX request is not happening, it is not bale to connect
@sap Please can you guide me on how to resolve this and ensure seamless integration between the FastAPI backend and the SAP Fiori front-end.

entry.title: Re: SAP fiori connecting to fastapi
entry.content: might need a proxy between frontend and fastapi

entry.title: Do you kwow how I can chiede 2 separared evaluations in Interview Central feature?
entry.content:
Hello community,

my Customer needs two separate evaluations in Interview Central: one for the behaviour skills and another for technical skills. Do you know how this can be configured?

 

Thanks

Ana

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: Home Office! #devtoberfest

entry.title: Re: IDOC issue as There is no article description for ite...
entry.content:
I have fixed this issue using below solution:

Pass material to XVBAP-MATNR in customer exit ZXVEDU03

Error message : VG 205 triggers in the standard program :

entry.title: Re: UI5 UploadSet beforeItemAdded event no longer fires.
entry.content: Use ctrl + shift + alt + s in the running app and check the technical information

entry.title: Want to know CO11N Final reservation indicator marked place in program
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to find out the Co11N final reservation indicator mark place. Means I want to know exact program or coding place where the KZEAR field will be mark with 'X'. When I debugged i can see RESB-KZEAR is blank in initial screen of CO11N select query place but after that where exactly the internal table of RESB getting marked 'X' to field KZEAR. Anyone can help me on this please, Already I spent lot of time to debug this standard process.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano

I identify as a person in the below categories:

People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts  People looking to switch their careers mid-life.

I am keen on learning and upgrade my skills.

Regards,

Hassam.

entry.title: Re: SAP fiori connecting to fastapi
entry.content:
as Marian mentioned you have to configure the proxy in the ui5.yaml file. Probably you are using the Fiori tooling, here you have an example of this config: 
https://github.com/lemaiwo/ODatav4DemoApp/blob/e3c4c1bc730a076378fd6f042156a5874ef3024d/app/ODataV4DemoUI/ui5.yaml#L20 

besides that, you can try following this tutorial to learn how everything is connected: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/appstudio-fioriapps-create..html

entry.title: Re: Can Azure AD be used in SAP Task Center config in pla...
entry.content:
It is indeed required to have cloud identity service for task center because it works with the global userid. I think it is possible to make it work without but you’re on your own…

Besides that, you can use Cloud Identity Service as a proxy for your azure ad or entra id. That way you are following the prerequisite and you can use your azure id/ entra id.

entry.title: Re: Can Azure AD be used in SAP Task Center config in pla...
entry.content: Hi @WouterLemaire any idea about how we can make it work without Cloud identity service ?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:

I am very much interested in Digital Skill Initiative by SAP. Looking to switch mid-career.

entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

entry.title: Re: Change-state in goal plan template and how to use thi...
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: RAP, create child entities based on static factory action
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on RAP Application where it consists of a Parent Entity with 3 child entities.
The Application is Managed with Late numbering.
I added a Action button at Child entity that it should create an entry/entries depends on inputs of action button pop-up.

When Purchase Order and/or Purchase item input is given, child entities are to be created and added at line item.




In Root view behavior, action is defined as 

  static factory action  getPurc parameter YINV_COPY_PO [1];

 For action button input, created an Abstract entity YINV_COPY_PO

@EndUserText.label: 'Copy PO Abstract entity'
define abstract entity YINV_COPY_PO
{
   @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'I_PurchaseOrder', element: 'PurchaseOrder' } }]
    ebeln : ebeln;
    ebelp : ebelp;   
}


yi_rbkp is parent entity with belnr, gjahr as key fields whereas yi_rseg is child entity with key fields as belnr,gjahr,buzei. The child entities have to be created based on ebeln and ebelp as these are not dependent of the Parent entity key fields. 

The below method logic could be incorrect and it ends up in below runtime error.

Method logic in Behavior

  METHOD getPurc.

    DATA lt_item TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE yi_rbkp\\yi_rbkp\_itm.
    DATA(ls_param) = VALUE #( keys[ 1 ]-%param OPTIONAL ).

    IF ls_param-ebelp IS INITIAL.
      SELECT * FROM
      ekpo INTO TABLE
      @DATA(lt_ekpo)
      WHERE ebeln = @LS_param-ebeln.
    ELSEIF ls_param-ebeln IS NOT INITIAL AND ls_param-ebelp IS NOT INITIAL.
      SELECT * FROM
      ekpo INTO TABLE
      @LT_ekpo
      WHERE ebeln = @LS_param-ebeln
      AND ebelp = @LS_param-ebelp.
    ELSEIF ls_param IS INITIAL.
      EXIT.
    ENDIF.

    READ ENTITIES OF yi_rbkp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY yi_rseg BY \_hdr
    ALL FIELDS
    WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(lt_rbkp).

    LOOP AT keys ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<key>).
      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<item>).

      <item>-%cid_ref = <key>-%cid.
      <item>-%is_draft = <key>-%param-%is_draft.
      LOOP AT  lt_ekpo ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ekpo>).
        APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <item>-%target ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<targ>).
        <targ>-%data = CORRESPONDING #( <ekpo> ).
        <targ>-%cid = <key>-%cid.
        <targ>-%is_draft = '01'.
        <targ>-%control-ebeln = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-ebelp = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-gjahr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-matnr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-menge = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-shkzg = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-waers = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-werks = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-wrbtr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-zekkn = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDLOOP.

    MODIFY ENTITIES of yi_rbkp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY yi_rseg   
    CREATE BY \_itm
    AUTO FILL CID
    FROM lt_item
    MAPPED DATA(ls_mapped)
         FAILED   DATA(ls_failed_modify)
         REPORTED DATA(ls_reported_modify).

    IF ls_failed_modify IS NOT INITIAL.
      failed = ls_failed_modify.
      reported = ls_reported_modify.
      RETURN.
    ENDIF.

    mapped-yi_rseg = ls_mapped-yi_rseg.
  ENDMETHOD.


Runtime error

entry.title: Re: I am unable to log in with SAP* or DDIC user passwords
entry.content: Can you connect with SAP* or DDIC in client 000? What user did you use in client 000?

entry.title: Re: Is there a new syntax (740, 750, 751) to MODIFY same internal table?
entry.content:
Possible Share me detailed Program


REPORT znew_it_syntax_6 NO STANDARD PAGE HEADING LINE-SIZE 1023.
*New Syntax
TYPES : BEGIN OF ty_final,
           empno(10) TYPE n,
           fname(30) TYPE c,
           mname(30) TYPE c,
           lname(30) TYPE c,
           cname(30) TYPE c,
           gmail(30) TYPE c,
           pcode(6)  TYPE n,
           mobil(10) TYPE n,
       END   OF ty_final.

DATA :
        lt_final TYPE SORTED TABLE OF  ty_final WITH UNIQUE KEY empno.


START-OF-SELECTION.
lt_final = VALUE #(
                  (
                   empno = 1
                   fname = 'SREE'
                   mname = 'SENTHIL'
                   lname = 'REDDY'
                   cname = 'SRIVAIBAVAAA'
                   gmail = 'SREESENTHILKUMARSAP@GMAIL.COM'
                   pcode = '606707'
                  )
                  (
                   empno = 2
                   fname = 'SREE'
                   mname = 'MANORANJAN'
                   lname = 'REDDY'
                   cname = 'SRIVAIBAVAAA'
                   gmail = 'SREESENTHILKUMARSAP@GMAIL.COM'
                   pcode = '606707'
                  )
                  (
                   empno = 3
                   fname = 'SREE'
                   mname = 'SRIVAIBAVAA'
                   lname = 'REDDY'
                   cname = 'SRIVAIBAVAAA'
                   gmail = 'SREESENTHILKUMARSAP@GMAIL.COM'
                   pcode = '606707'
                  )
                  (
                   empno = 4
                   fname = 'SREE'
                   mname = 'HANVIKA'
                   lname = 'REDDY'
                   cname = 'SRIVAIBAVAAA'
                   gmail = 'SREESENTHILKUMARSAP@GMAIL.COM'
                   pcode = '606707'
                  )
                  ).
LOOP AT lt_final INTO DATA(ls_final).
WRITE : /
             ls_final-empno,
             ls_final-fname,
             ls_final-mname,
             ls_final-lname,
             ls_final-cname,
             ls_final-gmail,
             ls_final-pcode.
ENDLOOP.
 lt_final = VALUE #( FOR <field_symbol> IN lt_final
                   LET lv_value = value IN
                   ( VALUE #( BASE CORRESPONDING #( <field_symbol> ) field = lv_value ) )
                 ).
SKIP 2.
WRITE 'AFTER MODIFICATION'.
LOOP AT Lt_final INTO ls_final.
WRITE : /
             ls_final-empno,
             ls_final-fname,
             ls_final-mname,
             ls_final-lname,
             ls_final-cname,
             ls_final-gmail,
             ls_final-pcode.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano , my name is Evinda Dwi Nur Aini, an Accounting student from Indonesia. I am currently working on an independent project focused on gaining an in-depth understanding of SAP, specifically the finance-related modules. Through this project, I have come to realize the growing importance of digital skills in the modern workforce, particularly in the fields of accounting and finance.

My motivation to participate in this digital skills initiative stems from my desire to broaden my knowledge and apply the latest technology in the professional world. I am highly interested in joining this free certification program because I believe it will equip me with a stronger foundation in understanding and practically implementing technology like SAP. Moreover, the digital skills offered through this program will certainly enhance my competitiveness in facing the challenges of the ever-evolving financial industry.

I am confident that this program will serve as a valuable stepping stone in deepening my digital competencies, and I look forward to contributing and actively engaging in discussions and learning within this community. Thank you so much for this amazing opportunity!

entry.title: Re: BindingObject of a selected list picker item
entry.content:
I tried to remove the template folder and recreate and worked.

What I meant to say is that I downloaded the MDK Client SDK from SAP Download Center, i do not use the MDK Client from Play Store because I need to debug the App trough Android Studio Device Simulator and VSCode.

I do not know if there is another way to debug directly from device.

entry.title: Re: Payload Examples for API Journal Entry – Post
entry.content:
Hi Wesley,

Thank you for sharing this valuable information.

I have a quick question: From what I understand, it is possible to include multiple Journal Entry Create Request nodes in a single payload to create several journal entries. In such a scenario, is there an option to ensure that if any one of the journal entries fails during processing, all the journal entries will be rolled back and not processed?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Seamless Integration: Connecting Sales Cloud V2 Opportunity Management with S/4HANA Customer Project
entry.content:
Story:

Prasad, a Sales Manager at PK Solutions, was excited about closing a big opportunity using SAP Sales Cloud V2. However, once the deal was won, handing over the project details to her colleague David, a Project Manager using S/4HANA Customer Projects, became cumbersome and prone to miscommunication. Prasad's sales data wasn’t seamlessly transferring to David’s project system, causing delays in project planning. After integrating Sales Cloud V2 with S/4HANA, Prasad could effortlessly sync opportunity details, giving David real-time visibility. Now, they collaborate smoothly, ensuring projects kick off faster with no data gaps, leading to satisfied customers and more efficient workflows

S/4HANA Customer Project in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud

As a rapidly expanding company, PK Solutions struggled to bridge the gap between sales opportunities and project execution. While their sales team leveraged SAP Sales Cloud V2 to manage opportunities, project managers depended on S/4HANA Customer Projects for delivery, leading to communication breakdowns and delays due to the lack of integration. By connecting Sales Cloud V2 with S/4HANA, they streamlined the entire opportunity-to-project process, enabling real-time visibility and smoother handovers. This seamless integration enhanced team collaboration, driving operational efficiency and boosting customer satisfaction.

Architecture diagram 

Process Flow: 

  • Opportunity created in Sales Cloud (v2) 
  • Opportunity set to In Process ----> Triggers autoflow call to create customer project via Integration Suite 
  • Customer project created with status ‘In Planning’ in S/4HANA Cloud via the integration 

Sales Cloud v2 – configurations : 

Step 1: Please replicate the master data from S/4HANA to Sales Cloud V2

Step 2 : Create a new Opportunity Type or use an existing one

Step 3: Create an iFlow that generates a customer project and triggers the auto-flow based on your specified conditions.

Step 4: Create an iFlow that generates a customer project and triggers the auto-flow based on your specified conditions.

Step 5: Create an Opportunity with below data

Step 6: Set the status= In process 

Step 7: Project ID will back V2 from S/4HANA

Conclusion

With the integration of Sales Cloud V2 and S/4HANA Customer Projects, Prasad and David eliminated workflow inefficiencies, leading to faster project execution and improved collaboration. This seamless connection ultimately enhanced customer satisfaction and business success.

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP New Syntax
entry.content:
Note that these forms are older than 7.40.

String Templates (7.02):

fld1 = |The Value in inr is { var1 }|.

Short method calls (6.10):

binary_content = cl_bcs_convert=>xstring_to_solix( ip_xstring = xl_content ).

entry.title: Re: I am unable to log in with SAP* or DDIC user passwords
entry.content: Log in with the same user as the one you have used in 000 (SAP_ALL copies all user master data and roles, including passwords).

entry.title: SAP build Process Automation
entry.content: state:false

entry.title: Segregation of inventory on the basis of budget consumed
entry.content:
Hey All

can segregation of value of material be achieved in same PO by account assignment category? 

for example 

if a company is raising a PO in which some percentage of material they are procuring is to be used for own resources project like maintainence and improving the system etc and other percentage of material will be used for consumer financed project whose payment they will recieve from consumers as per the PO rate. 

Now the problem is the company wants to have specific/standard price for the consumer financed works so that when the material is issued it should match the price we get on that PO and aggregate value for own resources works

so is that achievable through account assignment categories? if not then what is the solution in your suggestion please

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP DSP Task Chains with CLI Wrapping: FastAPI Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Christian,

Very interesting blog, thanks for that.

However, I was thinking there is possibility that the CLI was also using an API endpoint. There is a DSP API endpoint available for triggering task chains from external applications. This would mean triggering it from a Multi Action API step in SAC (authenticate with OAuth2.0), should be possible?

You can browse the available endpoints with the URL below :

I tested this with Postman, it works there (3rd party could be SAC but I did not test this :)).

Kind regards!

Cas

Any suggestion?

entry.title: Re: I am unable to log in with SAP* or DDIC user passwords
entry.content:
Hi 

Just follow the steps mentioned in the blog to unlock the user id and set the new password for DDIC using SAP* logon.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-unlock-sap-user-in-ms-sql-database/ba-p/13242617

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Database explorer, failed generating SQL based on prompt
entry.content: Is it the Trial or a productive environment? Do you select the complete text prompt before hitting "Run Prompt"?

entry.title: Re: Can't open Template Wizard
entry.content: it is known issue, you have to downgrade the VS to 1.93.

entry.title: Re: Suggestions: Career paths SAP HCM Consultant
entry.content:
I believe that your first step would be to find a company that uses SAP HCM and apply for an HR job that you have the qualifications for, even if it's only HR Clerk, or to find a SAP HCM Consulting Firm and apply for a beginning level job, such as Customer Service Clerk.  Once on the job, you should have some opportunities to demonstrate that you have knowledge beyond the position's job description.   

Note that to my knowledge, SAP HCM should be near it's end of support, and Cloud solutions (such as Success Factors) are the new norm, so finding an entry level job should be your first priority, then you can spend some time to learn about the system they use.

entry.content: Not working , it was SAP* , any steps to unlock the user from DB level ?

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello,

My name is Adam Benyaich, and I am currently working as a financial controller. I recently came across SAP, particularly the FICO Modules, and have developed a strong interest in exploring this field. I am eager to switch my career path toward SAP consulting, focusing on Finance.

Coming from Morocco, where opportunities in this area are limited, I was excited to discover SAP's Digital Skills program, which gave me hope that achieving a SAP certification could open doors and enhance my career prospects. I would be incredibly grateful for this opportunity and the potential growth it could provide.

I have already started following some courses on the SAP learning website and am enthusiastic to continue down this learning path. Attached is a screenshot of the courses I have completed so far.

Thank you for considering my interest, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Adam Benyaich

entry.title: Re: I am unable to log in with SAP* or DDIC user passwords
entry.content: UFLAG=0 means user unlocked: Update USR02 set UFLAG = 0 where MANDT = '000' AND BNAME = 'SAP*'

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification
entry.content: can I ask you. Which are used to perform configuration in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition?

entry.title: Reverting Container to the latest published version CLEARS ALL COMPONENTS of my app
entry.content:
My app BirdSoundFinland (106287) is built with Appgyver and is quite large, up to 250 pages. After a successful build last July I have recently made several attempts to get a successful build (update) using the latest Runtime version 4.11.167, but without success.

Here in the community somebody had got a successful build after reverting all components to the latest published version. I managed to do the same until I came to the CONTAINER. Reverting this component CLEARED ALL THE CONTENTS OF MY APP! Of course I didn't save the app at this point.

After this I still tried to get a build but it ended with error.

I also tried to get a build with a copy of the bundle, the one which was successful in July, without installing components to the latest published verson, but it also ended with error.

Now I don't know what to do. Please help!

Jan-Erik

Below you find the latest error report:

AB version: 2.13.5
COMMAND:

NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000 USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true npxrnv export -p android -s standalone_bundle -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p android -s standalone_bundle -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: Always with copilot at my side

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Bonjour @David_Chaviano je suis Asmae EL FEHRI de Maroc ,je suis titulaire d'un master en data science. Pendant mes études, j'ai découvert SAP lors d'un cours, et cela a tout de suite capté mon attention. J'ai réalisé à quel point cette technologie est importante pour les entreprises, et c'est là que j'ai décidé de me plonger plus sérieusement dans cet univers

Aujourd'hui, je souhaite aller plus loin en obtenant une certification SAP, car je suis convaincue que cela me permettra de renforcer mes compétences et d'apporter une réelle valeur dans mes projets futurs. Pour moi, cette initiative SAP est une opportunité en or, car elle me donne la chance d'apprendre un outil clé et d'obtenir une certification reconnue dans le monde entier. Cela me rapproche de mon objectif de devenir une experte dans ce domaine.

S Rajesh

entry.title: Re: Document Change Rules, Line Item - Profit Center and...
entry.content:
Hello @Nishantmangla these fields not allowed to be changed even if you maintain in document change rule to ensure integrity of data. You can reverse & repost document with correct data.

Only limited fields can be changed once document posted like assignment, document header text, payment term, payment method etc.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Hello SAP WORLD,
entry.content:
I am Rofida Bhaa Elhaidary and I am excited to participate in the Digital Skills Initiative and be part of your program

As my interest in technology has a special history in learning programming, artificial intelligence and related sciences and tools that help me develop my work in the field of accounting in all its branches. Technology is the main partner for any development, especially for companies that seek maximum profitability and control their resources to use them in the best way to achieve their goals.

 Because my work is always related to the corporate field, I have dealt in a way that was close to the SAP financial program, and this dealing made me feel more passionate and that this field of work is what achieves perfection in my work, as it combines my long experience in accounting and financial sciences and my passion for technology so I decided to shift my career to SAP FI/CO

I want to introduce myself; I am a single mother of two children who I have been taking care of for more than 10 years alone. I also hold a Bachelor's degree in accounting and have postgraduate studies certificate for five years after that in accounting and economic feasibility studies then I had many training courses in the fields of financial analysis, forecasting and accounting. I started learning SAP sciences myself for ten months ago.

I believe I am a good fit for the program because of my passion for learning and especially for SAP FI/CO depending on my solid knowledge in finance and accounting.

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because it will allow me to further my career by integrating SAP’s innovative solutions into real-world business applications and helping organizations achieve better efficiency.

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in technology, business transformation, and AI. I believe networking is an essential part of growth, and I am eager to exchange ideas and insights.

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

Best regards,

Rofida Elhaidary

Hi David

I'm eager to develop my digital skills to excel in the SAP field. I'm particularly interested in S/4 Hana Implementation. I believe these skills will be invaluable for driving innovation and success in SAP-related roles.

entry.title: Re: Transitioning from an SAP ERP - S/4HANA On-Premise Practitioner to an SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public
entry.content:
Hi Marco,

thanks for great insight , from on-prem to Cloud biggest challenge is custom program customer has created as their own model/application in ABAP. How to re-platform this kind of ABAP based product to work as extension with Cloud?

Should we use RAP or CAP and what is the selecting criteria with pros and cons?

thanks

@Marco 

ebsor

entry.title: Re: Need Help Identifying the Best Processing Instruction...
entry.content: Hi Juan, the whole idea behind the community is to leverage swarming knowledge but also share the knowledge. It wouldn't make sense if you send this information privately to me. Please write it down in this question and provide more context, like the screenshot of the application log - it must say something this cannot be the case.

entry.title: Re: Can Azure AD be used in SAP Task Center config in pla...
entry.content: Setting up the trust between the BTP account that has task center service running is just exchanging metadata files. But task center requires you to use the global user id which (if I’m not mistaken) is generated by CIS. So you’ll have to handle this yourself and provision this generated user id to your backend as well. But could be more behind the scenes that I’m missing…

entry.title: Re: can't log in NetWeaver AS ABAP trial
entry.content: Böyle bir hata alıyorum sorun nedir acaba

entry.title: Re: I am unable to log in with SAP* or DDIC user passwords
entry.content: Hi Shareef, Check this thread, https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-unlock-ddic-sap-user-in-000-client-sybase-database/qaq-p/10272530

entry.title: Re: Failed to load catalogs
entry.content:
I guess that not all the services of the Launchpad are activated or you haven’t configured the roles correctly.

Depending on your system version you have task lists available to automatically activate the fiori Launchpad correctly , check the details here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/22bbe89ef68b4d0e98d05f0d56a7f6c8/dbcae99e90e14bbd8ea43fbbd8e116ec.html

i highly recommend following this learning journey to get to know it better: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/learn-the-basics-of-sap-fiori/configuring-sap-fiori-launchpad_be40d546-d8f8-4a6b-b69f-7c77e1a0e9e1

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities
entry.content: hi @thomas_jung  , I have not received the badge #111D2A

entry.title: Hi SAP World !!!
entry.content:
Hi 

Thanks David for giving an opportunity to join in the SAP world !!! 

I have  a lot of  interest in participating in the digital skills initiative and embrace the knowledge of SAP which covers almost every business with innovative tools. I am pursuing my degree and into second year and wants to take up the career straight away after my graduation . I am being a first generation college student  a good fit to the program my education and interest in technical subject and your platform to male me explore more learning thru beginners corner will make my career path clear to me . Had you have not provided this opportunity , I might still thinking of my career in different dimension. 

Thanks for the invitation and welcome to the group !!!!

 

Thanks and Regards,

M CHANDAN KUMAR

Hence please suggest me how to achieve both the scenarios as the inspection type #08 is used in both the cases?

Thanks in advance.

    • People who are physically disabled .

entry.title: Automatic selection of required Task list while results recording.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have two inspection plans with different specifications for the same material, and I want that at the time the GRN system reads the only specific inspection plan that should be read. Is this possible to automate?
If yes, then how can we do this? Please guide.

Thanks.

entry.title: RPA/Bots: Are they really different from....?
entry.content:
Hello All,

Here, I am discussing specifically about the use-case of employing a RPA/Bot to read from a file and populate data into S/4, because a released API for that functionality isn't available.

Are they upgrade safe? I don't think so. SAP can change the screens on the app, make a field mandatory on the app or deprecate app with the next version upgrade and then the Bot won't work, isn't it?

So, why is Bot still being considered as an approach this scenario? ABAPers were taught, using BDC is bad practice, because of these same reasons. Bot is doing the exact same thing, yet it is considered an OK choice? Why?

With these same above mentioned risks, I could build a Google Chrome Browser Extension, to directly call the Service/API, that the Fiori page is using and upload the data much-much quicker than the time it would take Bot to traverse through the screens and populate data into S/4. Why is this not a more popular choice?

RPA/Bots in this use-case, are they really any different from BDC?

Thanks

entry.title: New member intro
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My name is Awo Jama, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I have a Master’s degree in Psychology, as well as a background in language services, case management, and cybersecurity. I’ve worked across various sectors, combining my skills in problem-solving and advocacy to help communities in need while expanding my technical skills in cloud computing.

I’m working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group. I’m looking forward to learning more about cloud-based business solutions and integrating technology into efficient business operations.

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because it aligns with my passion for technology and my goal to transition into roles that combine cloud computing, cybersecurity, and psychology.

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in technology, business transformation, and cloud solutions.

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

Best regards,
Awo Jama

entry.title: Optimizing Data Load for Large Replication Flow Object
entry.content:
Good day All,

I have a quick question regarding the optimization of data loading for a replication flow object containing over 400 million records. The object in question is the CDS view I_GLACCOUNTLINEITEMRAWDATA, which includes 348 columns.

We are using replication flows to transfer data from an on-premise S/4HANA system to Datasphere, utilizing an initial + delta load method.

I started the flow on Wednesday, but it stalled and ultimately failed on Thursday night after loading 170 million records out of the expected 400 million. The flow was stopped and then restarted. It is now presenting the following errors in Datasphere and S/4 HANA

SAP Datasphere:

S4 (Transaction code DHCDCMON )

Does anyone have suggestions or experience with optimizing the load process for such a large data set?

Thank you in advance for your guidance!

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP: Is it ok to use req._query[$filter] in a cus...
entry.content:
Hi @WouterLemaire! Thanks for your response!

Yeah, I tried to perform the modeling / query as the documentation you linked above, but I have no success at all (I think it is too much abstract to me right now)...

As for the req.query.SELECT.where property of the request, it gives the xpr version of the filters, like { xpr: [ {ref: [ 'propertyA']}, '=', {val: 'A'} ] } (or something similar to this - I dont have the exact results at hand )

I tried to parse this to the original filter string, with some the cds.parse methods (cds.parse.cql ,cds.parse.cdl, etc), but no sucess as well.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP: Is it ok to use req._query[$filter] in a custom handler?
entry.content: Hi @catano! Thanks for your response! I found interesting the example you linked! I tried to model my entity in a similar way, but I had no success. The navigation property in my case resides on the external service, and all the 'secondary/child' entities are there. So when I try to refer to them in my schema.cds I got errors saying that they aren't defined.

entry.title: SAPUI5 PDF Viewer Embedded not working on chrome
entry.content:
Hello experts! Good night!

In my current project I'm trying to load a pdf embedded in the view via the sapui5 PDFViewer control, but It only works on Microsoft Edge browser. In chrome, I'm getting a generic error like 'It was not possible to load de pdf'. 

For my surprise, the same occurs when I access the sample page:
PDF Viewer - Embedded - Samples - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com)

on chrome:

 

in edge :


here, if it is of some help, I have the console log of the chrome:

The same behavior was identified by my teammates.

May you share some thoughts?

Best regards!

Pedro

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
Re: Unable to access SAP Build Code Trial Account
entry.content:
Hi @DishaG 

I am also facing same issue while creating Fiori application on SAP Build Code. Below is the error

Insufficient privileges to perform this action.

Correlation Id: 9414b56b-071a-4ef7-64cc-22bddb29e22c

Facing this issue while creating New project from Trial account. Subscription to SAP Build Code was done using Booster.

Please help!

entry.title: From Salesforce to SAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I have been a Salesforce Consultant / Developer for the last 3 years and the market is kinda horrible, considering shifting to SAP and started learning ABAP already, many familiar concepts. 

I appreciate any advice or direction

entry.title: Re: Optimizing Data Load for Large Replication Flow Object
entry.content:
Hi ,

Please check your CDS views code once and try to optimise the code.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/6b94445c94ae495c83a19646e7c3fd56/7b3e645df1d044cead4d208ed62e8ef7.html?version=2.0.05&locale=en-US

 Try to analyze the OOM dump (1984422 - How-To: Analyzing SAP HANA Out-of-memory (OOM) Dumps)

Regards

Srinivas

entry.title: hubspot to SAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I've been a Hubspot Consultant/Developer for the last 7 years, and I'm feeling a bit stuck in a rut. The market is kinda horrible, so I'm thinking of shifting to SAP and started learning ABAP already. It's a lot of familiar concepts, so I'm feeling pretty confident about it! I'd love to hear any advice or direction you might have!

entry.title: New to Beginner Corner!
entry.content: Hi! I am a woman in IT and I am learning SAP with the hope that this knowledge will advance my IT career!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: how to stop received notification from this post?

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: This is my wished desktop setup, with that comfort new ideas will surely emerge using SAP technology!!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

Thanks for overseeing this opportunity for free learning!  I have worked at AWS with Enterprise accounts and I also have been an IT reseller selling MSFT licensing. I want learn about SAP and SAP Cloud products & services.

Best,
Tera

entry.title: Re: Integration of SAP CI(BTP IS) with IBM MQ through AMQP
entry.content:
Could you please provide the info where you provided the username and password while setting up the MQ Broker ?

I'm getting the below error even though I have defined the MCA user on the AMQP channel and provided the same in Security Material in IS.

 

org.springframework.jms.JmsSecurityException: AMQXR0100E: A connection from 192.168.1.67 was not authorized. [condition = amqp:unauthorized-access]; nested exception is javax.jms.JMSSecurityException: AMQXR0100E: A connection from 192.168.1.67 was not authorized. [condition = amqp:unauthorized-access], cause: org.apache.qpid.jms.provider.exceptions.ProviderConnectionSecurityException: AMQXR0100E: A connection from 192.168.1.67 was not authorized. [condition = amqp:unauthorized-access

entry.title: SAP Learning Group Introduction
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

 

My name is Jasmine and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I graduated from the University of Alabama with a bachelor degree in communications and information sciences. I currently work in management at a retail establishment. I’m going to back to school to work towards my masters degree and expand my knowledge. 

 

I’m currently working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge in finance. 

 

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because I’m ready to expand, and move on to something new in my career. Technology has always been very fascinating to me, so this will give me the chance to explore and learn more about my passion. 

 

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in technology. 

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

 

Best regards,  

Jasmine

entry.title: BAPI_ACC_INVOICE_RECEIPT_POST Negative sign not updating for positive amount document
entry.content:
Hi, 

Using BAPI_ACC_INVOICE_RECEIPT_POST, I am trying to create an accounting document with a positive amount and a negative quantity. 

Despite the BAPI posting the correct positive amount, but the quantity is posted with a positive sign.

It would be appreciated if you could tell me how we can achieve create accounting document with negative quantities for positive amounts. below is my values passing to BAPI structure.

Amount is 8 dollars and -1 quantity.

entry.title: Re: Downtime optimization using DoDMO during ECC to S/4 Conversion Run
entry.content: Excellent info..

entry.title: Questions for CDS aggregation expression
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a CDS view like header-item hierarchy, assuming 1 header to n items, and I want to do aggregation on item level.

I tried to group by on the header field and select the first item as aggregation result, but I only see expressions like MAX, MIN, AVG. Is there a way that I can simply use the line of first item.

The second question is that if I use MAX, how to handle with RAW type because it was not supported.

Last question is that if association exists, is it required to include all association fields in the group by field list?

Regards,
Eric
